items.name_en: New Chanel 25 Bag|||The rising "Chanel 25bag" is another "It Bag" following the Chanel 22bag! The design is classic and practical, continuing the brand's three signature elements: quilted lambskin, chain strap, and double-C turn-lock, but the drawstring design looks more casual![Selfie][Blow Kiss]
items.name_cn:
New Chanel 25 Bag|||The rising "Chanel 25bag" is another "It Bag" following the Chanel 22bag! The design is classic and practical, continuing the brand's three signature elements: quilted lambskin, chain strap, and double-C turn-lock, but the drawstring design looks more casual![Selfie][Blow Kiss]
Carrying Styles & Comfort:
The chain strap is adjustable in length, supporting shoulder, crossbody, and hand-carry styles, suitable for commuting, dates, and casual occasions;
A separate leather lining enhances support, making it comfortable to carry for long periods.
Fits a phone, small wallet, and keys Light travel, evening wear
The Chanel 25 Bag has a "just right" golden size, balancing capacity, portability, and daily adaptability, widely regarded as the most handy choice.
Dimensions 30x26x14

items.name_en: 🆕 Changed Code Chip Version Exclusive Real Photos This M13137
items.name_cn:
🆕 Changed Code Chip Version Exclusive Real Photos This M13137
Launched for the 2025 Cruise early spring runway, the Nova Small and Medium bags present a subtle mirror effect on the noble calfskin, combining a casual style with an elegant tone. Brand and Monogram canvas trim highlight classic elements, and the dazzling sliding chain makes it easy to create a refined look.
Monogram canvas trim fabric lining metal brand name
Center zip pocket
Chain: Sliding and adjustable, not removable
Chain half-length: 28.0cm
Chain half-length adjustable to: 50.0cm
Monogram canvas trim fabric lining metal brand name interior pocket
Fits laptops and A4 documents
Detailed Features Length Height Width Dimensions
Large: 37x36x10cm

items.name_en: 🆕 Chip Version Top-tier Original M12425 Single-zip Wallet Introducing the new Margot Wallet, a stylish piece that achieves a perfect balance between contemporary and classic design. It is made from the iconic Monogram Empreinte leather, featuring polished gold hardware, including a metal plate engraved with the iconic Louis Vuitton signature. The interior offers multiple pockets and compartments for coins and bills, plus six card slots. Size 17 x 11 x 2cm
